title: December 7, 2021: Nutrition Science Advisory Committee: Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Nutrition Science Advisory Committee (NSAC): Fifth Meeting Agenda
- Review and approve the Record of Proceedings from the fourth meeting
- Discuss and provide advice on how to bring the ‘what’ and ‘how’ together, using Health Canada’s Evidence Review Cycle for Dietary Guidance (“ERC”) as an example
- Propose short-term forward plan and seek Committee members’ feedback
Nutrition Science Advisory Committee Fifth Meeting, December 7, 2021.
Welcome & Declarations of Affiliations and Interests Led by NSAC Co-Chairs
Approval of Record of Proceedings from Fourth Meeting Led by NSAC Co-Chairs
Approval of Motion to update the Committee’s Terms of Reference Led by Health Canada & NSAC Co-Chairs
Monitoring: Focus on Canadian Context input of the Evidence Review Cycle for Dietary Guidance Presenters: Sylvie St-Pierre, Manager, Research and Data Analysis Unit and Kimberley Hernandez, Lead, Evidence Review Team, Office of Nutrition Policy and Promotion, Health Canada
Focused Discussion: ERC – Canadian context Led by NSAC Co-Chairs
Focused Discussion: Moving Forward in 2022 Led by Health Canada & NSAC Co-Chairs
Closing Remarks Led by NSAC Co-Chairs
